name: KFC Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Lipton cup soup tomato OR (cream of chicken/mushroom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. Place some of the mixture in a bag and add pieces of chicken, shaking to coat.
3. Repeat with another portion of the mixture, coating all the chicken pieces.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
